Title: Web Scraping with Python
Data: Web scraping is the process of extracting data from websites. In Python, libraries like Requests and Beautiful Soup 4 (BS4) make this task straightforward. First, you use Requests to fetch the HTML content of a webpage, then BS4 allows you to parse that HTML and locate specific elements using CSS selectors or IDs. This is perfect for gathering product prices, news headlines, or financial data automatically.
